text.message: how on earth you rob me?
why u take my brick port
what am I gonna do with all these road mats
do you see red with 5 devs?
what is my path to win here?
that's why I blocked you buddy
since I knew red has 2 wheat
ah okay, didn't see you discarding one
so red has no knight in for devs
couldn't draw em to save my life
you guys are lucky i extended
i could have settled the port instead
if I'm at 7 then good chance black is at 8
all you need to do is extend
how is that a winning roll ?
and you can always pull a dev
unless red has trully 4 vps and you have the last one
